---
title: "Home"
---

<img src="assets/ben-spoek-home.webp" alt="Ben Spoek cycling in the mountains" class="home-photo">

Hi, I am Ben. This is my research-related homepage. You can find information on the following topics:

- [Research & Publications](research.qmd)
- [Collaboration & Open Theses](theses.qmd)
- [CV](cv.qmd)
- [Teaching](teaching.qmd)
- [Hobbies & Interests](hobbies.qmd)

Please feel free to reach out any time under [Contact](contact.qmd).
